title: SOS Ask Message v1
description: Blocking-style message sent from one agent to another expecting a reply. The recipient must reply with a message whose reply_to field equals this message's message_id. Used by mcp__sos__ask.

type.description: Message type discriminator. Always 'ask' for this schema.

source.description: Agent identifier of the sender in the format 'agent:{name}'.

target.description: Agent identifier of the intended recipient in the format 'agent:{name}'.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the ask was created.

version.description: SemVer of the message schema this record conforms to.

message_id.description: Unique identifier for this ask message. The reply message must set reply_to equal to this value.

payload.description: The body of the ask containing the question and reply routing information.

question.description: The question or prompt posed to the recipient agent. Plain text or markdown.

reply_channel.description: The address where the recipient should deliver its reply. Either a direct agent address ('agent:{name}') or a named SOS channel ('sos:channel:{name}').

timeout_s.description: Maximum seconds the sender will wait for a reply before treating the ask as timed out. If absent, the sender may wait indefinitely.

correlation_id.description: Optional UUID used to correlate this ask with a parent workflow, saga, or trace.
